key_insights: Strong music venue network across Terminal West, The Eastern, District Atlanta, Believe Music Hall with published event calendars
Major seasonal festivals: Shaky Knees (Sep 18-20), Atlanta Jazz Fest (May), Inman Park Fest (Apr 25-26)
Recurring community events: Atlanta Streets Alive (monthly bikes), Sol Dance (bi-weekly), Lake Claire Drum Circle (full moon)
High-interest date night experiences: Pigalle Cabaret, Fernbank After Dark, Dinner Detective, Candlelight concerts
Family evergreen: Zoo Atlanta, Georgia Aquarium, Fernbank Museum, ABG have memberships; Sloomoo and LEGO for rainy days
Geographic hub: 30306 (Virginia-Highland/Midtown) with 10 min to Midtown venues, 5 min to Poncey-Highland venues
Niche discoveries: Plaza Theatre, Manual's Tavern (community hubs not yet captured in main guides)
